generated_oml:
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring position of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionData
]

instance CraneVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for measuring velocity of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneVelocityData
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneVelocitySensor
]

instance CraneOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational parameters data including position and velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionData, CraneVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model for geometric representation of the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GrafanaVisualization
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for motion simulation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonCoreImplementation
]

instance PythonCoreImplementation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language used for core implementation of the digital twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerized deployment for reproducible digital twin environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database for historical data storage and real-time analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for interactive data visualization dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time data streaming between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging of operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for system monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for puck movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation against physical system's behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational parameters to support analysis and decision-making"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for system monitoring"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for puck movement in the gantry crane system"
]

instance ContinuousValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation against physical system behavior for accuracy"
]

instance LabGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for the Lab-scale gantry crane system used for research and educational purposes"
    base:contains CranePositionSensor, CraneVelocitySensor, PythonCoreImplementation, DockerContainerization, TimescaleDBDatabase, GrafanaVisualization, EclipseMosquittoBroker
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service generates optimal movement trajectories using a kinematic model of the crane, which are processed by the Control Application. The Control Application uses the Physical Crane Interface (Python program) to send command signals (e.g., trajectory instructions) to the physical crane's controllers. Validation occurs via the Continuous Validation Service comparing simulated and executed trajectories, though command message formats and authentication mechanisms are not specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system's architecture is structured using the C4 Model, with context and container diagrams defining component interactions and system organization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation is performed by comparing executed trajectory measurements against simulations using Euclidean distance metrics; discrepancies exceeding threshold values trigger error correction processes to maintain model fidelity and system accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "All components run on a single personal computer interconnected via an MQTT-based network topology using Eclipse Mosquitto as the broker for inter-service communication (e.g., Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service). The physical crane is connected directly to the computer via a hardware interface (e.g., USB/serial), though specifics are not detailed. Bandwidth, latency, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on-premise on a single personal computer with TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT Broker, and Grafana Dashboard containerized using Docker via a docker-compose file. Other components (Control Application, Logging Application) run as Python applications on the host machine. Scalability and redundancy mechanisms are not detailed, but the deployment supports single-node execution with containerized services."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Lab-Scale Gantry Crane follows an ad-hoc approach without adherence to specific industry standards or frameworks, utilizing containerization for deployment but not following formal standardization protocols."
]
